mentionsLegales.title: Legal Notices
mentionsLegales.metaDescription: REPUTEXA legal notices: publisher, hosting LCEN art. 6, providers, Impressum, CNIL, consumer mediation, intellectual property.
mentionsLegales.intro:
In accordance with law no. 2004-575 of June 21, 2004, for confidence in the digital economy (LCEN) and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), these legal notices identify the publisher of the site reputexa.fr, the technical providers, contact methods, and recourse paths. They are drafted to be supplemented by the privacy policy (Loyalty and Reviews) and the terms of service.

Last updated: April 2026 — version 1.3.
mentionsLegales.editeur_content: The site reputexa.fr is published by REPUTEXA, a company in the process of registration or registered in France (legal form, exact name, registered office address, SIREN/SIRET number, VAT number if applicable: to be completed upon registration and displayed at the top of this section). In the meantime: professional contact details: contact@reputexa.fr. Share capital: if applicable, indicated after registration.
mentionsLegales.impressum_content: In accordance with applicable requirements in Germany (§ 5 TMG) and in the European Union, the Impressum includes the publisher information above (name, headquarters, contact). These notices serve as Impressum for all users, including those located in Germany. Contact: contact@reputexa.fr.
mentionsLegales.directeur_content: The publication director is the individual identified as such with the host and the competent authority (founder / legal representative of REPUTEXA). Name and title: to be completed after the company's formation.
mentionsLegales.hebergeur_content: In accordance with article 6-I-2° of the LCEN, the following elements are specified. Web application (front and API): Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, USA — site and legal notices: vercel.com/legal; deployment may be operated via the European entity Vercel Netherlands B.V. depending on your billing area. Application data (PostgreSQL database, authentication, storage associated with the project): Supabase — project configured in the European Union region (eu-*) when available; privacy policy and DPA: supabase.com. Sending transactional emails: Resend — resend.com/legal. Payments: Stripe Payments Europe Ltd or applicable Stripe entity depending on your country — stripe.com/legal. WhatsApp messaging (Zenith plan / alerts): Twilio Inc. or applicable subsidiary — twilio.com/legal. AI providers (text suggestions): OpenAI / Anthropic depending on configured API keys — processing governed by the terms and DPA of these publishers. Subcontractors are contractually bound to confidentiality and data security (GDPR, art. 28). Merchant account data is generally hosted in the EU; some processing (e.g., AI API) may involve regulated transfers (standard contractual clauses, supplier policies). Detail: Privacy Policy. AI-based features may produce errors; generated content is indicative — Terms of Service (article 5) and privacy policy (section 8).
mentionsLegales.droit_content: The applicable law is French law. Without prejudice to the mandatory provisions of the user's country of residence in the European Union, these notices and the site are governed by French law. Consumer users residing in the EU retain the rights granted to them by the mandatory provisions of their country of residence.
mentionsLegales.prop_intel_content: The REPUTEXA platform, the SaaS software tool (features, code, architecture, associated documentation), and all content on the site (texts, graphics, logos, databases) constitute the exclusive property of REPUTEXA and are protected by copyright, trademark law, and related rights. Any unauthorized reproduction, representation, or exploitation constitutes an infringement liable to prosecution.
mentionsLegales.liens_content: The site may contain links to third-party sites. REPUTEXA does not exercise any control over these sites and disclaims any responsibility for their content. Creating links to reputexa.fr is subject to the prior agreement of the publisher.
mentionsLegales.cnil_content: For any questions regarding personal data, you can contact: contact@reputexa.fr. You have the right to file a complaint with the CNIL (National Commission for Information Technology and Freedoms), 3 Place de Fontenoy — TSA 80715 — 75334 PARIS CEDEX 07, France — www.cnil.fr — if you believe that the processing of your data does not comply with the GDPR. If you reside in another EU member state, you can contact the data protection authority in your country.
mentionsLegales.mediation_content: In accordance with articles L.612-1 and following of the Consumer Code, any consumer has the right to free recourse to a consumer mediator for the amicable resolution of disputes with a professional. After a prior written approach to REPUTEXA that remains unsuccessful, the consumer may contact the competent mediator whose identity will be specified on this page once the system is formalized (or the sectoral or general mediator to which REPUTEXA belongs). European online dispute resolution platform (ODR): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/
mentionsLegales.contact_content: For any questions regarding these legal notices: contact@reputexa.fr.

confidentialite.title: Privacy Policy
confidentialite.metaDescription: GDPR Privacy Policy: loyalty and reviews, purposes, subcontractors, durations, multi-property, STOP, import, AI.
confidentialite.intro: Last updated: April 2026. Version: 1.3 — unique 'Loyalty & Reviews' policy. This document describes the processing of personal data related to review solicitation (WhatsApp, technical queue) and the loyalty program (points, rewards, anniversaries, checkout, and terminal). It is consistent with the record of processing activities (article 30 GDPR) published on this site. AI features may produce erroneous outputs: they are indicative and must be validated by the User before dissemination (see section 8). No system guarantees absolute security or compliance; REPUTEXA applies proportionate measures and updates this policy when processing or regulations evolve.

toc.label: 7. Zenith Plan — Review Collection and Final Customer Data
8. AI Guarantee — Data Not Used for Training

confidentialite.responsable_content:
The data controller for personal data within the meaning of articles 4 and 26 GDPR is REPUTEXA, publisher of the site reputexa.fr, whose headquarters is located in France. The processing is documented in the record of processing activities (article 30 GDPR), accessible on this site. REPUTEXA applies the principles of data minimization, limitation of retention, and limitation of purposes.

For any questions regarding processing: contact@reputexa.fr.
confidentialite.roles_rgpd_content: REPUTEXA is the data controller for data related to the management of its own customers (user accounts, billing, support). REPUTEXA acts as a technical processor (article 28 of the GDPR) on behalf of its Users (Merchants) for: sending WhatsApp solicitations, review queue, loyalty and rewards programs (points, tiers, birthday gifts, associated campaigns), importing customer lists, and connected checkout or terminal features, under documented instructions from the merchant (account settings, loyalty rules, imported files). The Merchant remains solely responsible for the loyalty strategy, scales, validated messages, and legal bases towards its own customers. Final customer data is only processed to execute these instructions. Processing may be pooled among different properties belonging to the same data controller to allow the customer to benefit from their advantages across the entire network (points usable in multiple stores of the same operator, depending on configuration). Records of consent or refusal (STOP) may be retained as proof of compliance (technical logging).
confidentialite.donnees_content: We collect, among other things: professional email address for account and authentication; billing identifiers and payment data processed by Stripe; content of reviews and data from your Google Business Profile when you connect the Google API; name, first name, professional phone, property name, address; language preference; technical data (IP address, server logs, session identifiers, strictly necessary cookies for operation and security). For the Zenith plan and loyalty: data transmitted by your systems (checkout, e-commerce, terminal) via webhooks or entry (first name, phone, purchase context or amount, number of items if applicable, delivery status if applicable), balance or history of points and rewards, date of birth or birthday month when you collect them for related benefits, postal address or city if you register them for customer relations. Importing files (CSV, Excel, etc.): the columns you map (identity, phone, purchases, etc.) are processed to feed your loyalty program database or campaigns, under your responsibility regarding the legality of the initial collection (see also our Terms of Service, import clause).
confidentialite.locale_content: To enhance your user experience and offer you an interface, communications, and support in your language, we may infer a language preference from the area code of your phone number (e.g., +1 for the USA, +44 for the UK, +33 for France). This information is used solely to personalize the language of the interface, emails, and payment portal. You can change the language in your account settings at any time.
confidentialite.finalites_content: Data is processed for: executing the contract and providing the service (account, subscription, subscribed features); managing the Merchant's loyalty program: calculating and tracking points, awarding rewards (tiers, anniversaries, one-time offers), personalizing customer relations, multi-site management when the same data controller operates multiple properties; legitimate interest (security, fraud prevention, service improvement, anonymized technical audience measurement if applicable); consent when required (WhatsApp solicitations, non-essential cookies, commercial communications according to your configuration); legal obligations (accounting and tax retention of invoices, responding to authorities). The specific purposes regarding final customers are defined and communicated by the Merchant (point of sale, T&Cs, store policy).
confidentialite.sous_traitants_content: Your data may be processed by the following subcontractors, strictly within the scope of their mission and under documented instructions: Stripe (payments, subscriptions, billing); Resend (transactional emails); OpenAI and/or Anthropic (generating response suggestions, audio transcription if applicable); Supabase (database, authentication — project in EU region); Vercel (hosting of the application); Google (OAuth, Google Business Profile API); Twilio and/or Meta (WhatsApp depending on configuration); Cloudflare (Turnstile if activated). These providers are bound by standard contractual clauses (GDPR) or equivalents in accordance with their public DPA. The list of subcontractors may evolve: updating this policy or your information space.
confidentialite.zenith_captation_title: 7. Zenith Plan — Review Collection and Final Customer Data
confidentialite.zenith_captation_content: The Zenith plan includes automated review collection ('Capture AI') and may be combined with messages related to the loyalty program (benefits, reminders) according to the rules configured by the Merchant. WhatsApp contacts respect the purposes and prior information defined by the Merchant (physical commerce or, for the online store, after delivery when the webhook transmits the appropriate status). REPUTEXA acts as a processor (article 28 GDPR); the Merchant remains responsible for processing its customers' data. For the same number and the same merchant account, a new review solicitation campaign is not triggered until 120 days after the start of the previous one (unless displayed rule or contrary configuration). The data retained in the technical queue for review solicitation are short-term data: they are anonymized or deleted no later than 120 days after their entry into the queue (subject to opposition records or legal obligations), in accordance with the operational settings of the service. After the anti-solicitation period, a new invitation to review may again be scheduled for this number if it is not on the opposition list. Loyalty data (points history, active account) follows distinct durations — see 'Retention Periods' section. Response 'STOP' or refusal: cessation of messages according to technical mechanisms; a broad opposition or request for total removal may lead to the closure of the loyalty account and loss of unused benefits, under the conditions set by the Merchant and specified in the 'Your Rights' section. Logging of consents/refusals: technical records for proof purposes.
confidentialite.ia_content:
The content submitted for generating suggestions (responses to reviews, drafts of WhatsApp or SMS messages, establishment context) is processed by AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, or equivalents) solely to provide the functionality. Subject to the applicable contractual policies, REPUTEXA configures uses in accordance with 'no training' / zero retention options when available. You must check the providers' DPA for legal details. Do not submit unnecessary or sensitive data.

The outputs of the models may be incorrect, incomplete, or unsuitable for the context; they do not constitute legal, tax, commercial, or reputation management advice provided by REPUTEXA.

The User (Merchant) acknowledges that the content generated by the AI are suggestions subject to error. The data controller remains responsible for final validation before sending or publishing. REPUTEXA cannot be held responsible for consequences related to dissemination without sufficient human control (commercial commitments, discounts, promises, language or content errors), subject to mandatory legal obligations. Additional contractual limits and exclusions of liability: see Terms of Service (article 'Liability').
confidentialite.securite_content:
Data is processed with encryption in transit (TLS) and security measures at rest in accordance with industry practices (managed hosting of the type Supabase). The project is configured in the European Union region when possible. For the Zenith Plan, access to final customer data from Merchants is limited by design (automated processing, separation of environments).

REPUTEXA implements a security policy proportionate to the risk: access management, dependency updates, monitoring of application logs as permitted by the offering, and incident response according to internal procedures. No system is infallible; in the event of a security incident likely to affect personal data, the measures provided in the 'Data Breaches' paragraph apply.

Record of processing activities (article 30 GDPR): https://reputexa.fr/docs/registre-rgpd-reputexa.html (adapt the domain if necessary).
confidentialite.cookies_content: We use strictly necessary cookies and local storage for the operation of the service (session, security preferences, possibly Cloudflare Turnstile captcha). Any cookie or tracker not essential to the provision of the service will be subject to your prior consent when required by regulation (consent banner). You can configure your browser to refuse cookies; some features may then be degraded.
confidentialite.transferts_content: When subcontractors are located outside the European Union or processing is conducted there (e.g., American AI providers), transfers are governed by the instruments provided by the GDPR: standard contractual clauses of the European Commission, additional measures if applicable, and supplier policies. You can request a copy of the applicable guarantees at contact@reputexa.fr.
confidentialite.durees_content:
We distinguish durations according to purpose:

Review solicitation data (technical queue Zenith, excluding active loyalty account): short retention — the identifying elements necessary for the campaign are anonymized or deleted no later than 120 days after their entry into the queue, except for aggregated or statistical data without direct identification; a new invitation to leave a review for the same number (not opposed) is only possible after the anti-solicitation period described in the Zenith section (120 days from the start of the previous campaign).

Loyalty data (points program, rewards, history with the Merchant): retention for the entire duration of the loyalty account activity of the customer with the Merchant on the platform. Account deemed inactive in the absence of qualified purchase or recorded loyalty interaction for thirty-six (36) consecutive months; thereafter, data may be deleted or anonymized according to the Merchant's procedures and service settings, subject to prior information of the customer when required by law and opposition lists.

Merchant user account and billing: duration of the contract plus accounting and tax obligations (often ten years for supporting documents, according to applicable law).

Opposition list (STOP): retention of the number or its fingerprint to no longer solicit, with no contractual duration limit set for the opposition itself.

Consent logs: retention for proof of compliance, reasonable duration in light of disputes. Durations may be adjusted to comply with a legal obligation or a court decision.
confidentialite.violations_content: In the event of a personal data breach likely to result in a risk to the rights and freedoms of individuals, REPUTEXA documents the incident, analyzes the causes, and, when required by regulation, notifies the competent supervisory authority (including the CNIL in France) within the deadlines provided by the GDPR, and informs the affected individuals when the breach is likely to result in a high risk. Internal procedures aim to limit network and application impact. Operational details (technical logs, internal IP addresses) may be communicated to authorities as part of a legal obligation or a founded request, but are not published on this site.
confidentialite.portabilite_content: From your account settings, you can download a structured export of your data (JSON) and request the permanent deletion of your account in accordance with the GDPR. The export includes, among other things, the profile, reviews, queue, blacklist, loyalty data managed via your merchant account, and associated consent logs. Deleting the account results in the deletion or anonymization of associated data subject to legal retention obligations.
confidentialite.droits_content:
In accordance with the GDPR, you have the rights of access, rectification, deletion, limitation of processing, portability, opposition (notably for marketing), and the right to define directives regarding the fate of your data after your death (under French law). For merchant accounts: contact@reputexa.fr. For final customers of a store using REPUTEXA: first contact the Merchant; you can also use the deletion form hosted on this site (link at the bottom of this page). You can file a complaint with the CNIL (cnil.fr) or the supervisory authority in your country of residence. Minors should not use the service without the consent of their legal guardian.

WhatsApp, STOP, and loyalty: responding STOP ends automatic messages of this type sent via the concerned channel. If you require complete removal from all contact lists of the Merchant or deletion of your loyalty account, cessation of solicitations may lead to the closure of the loyalty account and loss of unused points or benefits, in accordance with the Merchant's loyalty regulations and applicable texts; request it at the point of sale or via the contact details indicated on the information poster.

Automated decisions and profiling (article 22 GDPR): the suggestions generated by the AI are proposals to be validated by the professional before sending or publishing; they do not produce legal effects vis-à-vis the final consumer without human validation on the Merchant's side.
confidentialite.contact_content: For any questions regarding the protection of your data: contact@reputexa.fr. Response time: we strive to respond within one month, which may be extended by two months in case of complexity, in accordance with the GDPR.
confidentialite.client_finaux_erasure_notice: If you have been solicited via WhatsApp as part of the REPUTEXA service on behalf of a business and wish to request the deletion of your data without going through WhatsApp (STOP), you can use the dedicated form (same number as that used at the merchant):

dataRightsClient.metaDescription: Request the deletion of data related to the number used for reviews or loyalty REPUTEXA (without merchant account, outside WhatsApp STOP).
dataRightsClient.title: Personal Data — Final Customers
dataRightsClient.subtitle: This form is addressed to individuals contacted via REPUTEXA on behalf of a business, without an account on this site.
dataRightsClient.formIntro: Please provide the relevant phone number (in the same format as at checkout or on the order slip). We will process the corresponding records in our systems (review queue, opposition lists, associated logging, and if applicable loyalty data hosted on behalf of the Merchant), within technical and legal limits and according to the instructions received from the Data Controller. For review only: without opposition, a new WhatsApp request for this number (same business) is generally not sent as long as 120 days have not elapsed since the start of the previous campaign. A broad deletion request may lead to the closure of the loyalty program and loss of associated benefits on the merchant side — see the Loyalty and Reviews policy and the store regulations.
dataRightsClient.phoneHint: Recommended international format. Requests are protected by anti-bot verification.
dataRightsClient.success: Your request has been recorded. The data associated with this number in our solicitation systems have been deleted or processed in accordance with our policy.
dataRightsClient.errorGeneric: Unable to process the request at this time. Please try again later or write to contact@reputexa.fr.
dataRightsClient.footnote: For REPUTEXA merchant accounts, exports and deletions are managed from Settings. In case of urgency: contact@reputexa.fr.
dataRightsClient.privacyLinkLocaleHint: The links below are directed towards the language inferred from the phone code (e.g. +39 → Italian, +49 → German). First enter your number in international format.
dataRightsClient.dataRightsSameFormLink: This page (deletion request) in this language
dataRightsClient.errorRateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a minute before trying again.
dataRightsClient.errorInvalidPhone: Invalid number. Use the international format (e.g. +33612345678).

cgu.title: Terms of Service
cgu.metaDescription: REPUTEXA Terms of Service. SaaS subscription, Stripe billing, termination, force majeure, mediation, French law.
cgu.intro: Last updated: April 2026. Version: 1.3. These Terms of Service (ToS) constitute the framework contract between REPUTEXA and the user of the service. They cover the use of the reputation platform, review collection (including Zenith), conversational AI tools, and multi-channel loyalty features. They apply to any subscription taken out on reputexa.fr, without prejudice to the imperative rights of consumers. The privacy policy (Loyalty and Reviews version) and legal notices are an integral part of the contractual documentation. REPUTEXA operates artificial intelligence models: their outputs may be inaccurate or unsuitable; any suggestion produced by the service must be reviewed and validated by the User before sending or publishing (see article 5).

toc.label: 3. Language Differentiation Clause — AI Response Language
7. Zenith Plan — Merchant Obligations and Limitation of Liability
Annex — Customer Information Template (loyalty, checkout, WhatsApp)
8. Modification of the ToS and Service
10. Suspension, Termination, and End of Subscription

cgu.objet_content: These ToS define the terms of access and use of the REPUTEXA service, a SaaS reputation platform. By creating an account or subscribing, you unreservedly accept these conditions.
cgu.plans_content: REPUTEXA offers several subscription plans (Vision, Pulse, Zenith, and possible extensions). Features (review aggregation, AI responses, alerts, reporting, loyalty program, connected terminal or checkout, customer file import) vary according to the plan and activated modules. Detailed descriptions are available on the Pricing page.
cgu.langue_title: 3. Language Differentiation Clause — AI Response Language
cgu.langue_content: By contractual provision, the language of responses generated by the AI is differentiated according to the subscribed plan: Vision Plan: responses to reviews are generated exclusively in the language of the establishment (language of the user profile). The service does not offer responses in other languages. Pulse and Zenith Plans: the service is multilingual; responses are generated natively in the language of the customer's review (automatic detection of the review language and response in that same language). This clause is an integral part of the service conditions and can only be modified in case of plan change.
cgu.facturation_content: Prices displayed are exclusive of taxes (net). VAT is calculated and applied automatically by Stripe according to the buyer's country and applicable rules (intra-community VAT, local rate, etc.). Payment is collected by Stripe (cards, SEPA, local payment methods). The subscription is recurring (monthly or annually). Any month started is due; in case of termination, no prorated refund will be granted except for mandatory legal provisions or commercial goodwill indicated on the site. Invoices are available in the client area and via the Stripe client portal.
cgu.responsabilite_content:
REPUTEXA provides a software tool and acts as a technical provider and processor under the GDPR for the processing entrusted by the merchant. The User (Merchant) is solely responsible for the legality of its own processing (legal bases, information and consents, display at the point of sale, loyalty regulations) and the content it publishes, validates, or transmits. REPUTEXA cannot be held responsible for the User's breaches of GDPR, ePrivacy, or competition law obligations. The service is provided 'as is'; REPUTEXA makes reasonable efforts for availability without guarantee of results or absence of errors. Except for proven fraud or deceit, REPUTEXA's liability is limited to the amounts actually paid by the User in the twelve (12) months preceding the event giving rise to liability, unless otherwise required by mandatory legal provisions.

Artificial intelligence — nature of the service and limits: REPUTEXA operates artificial intelligence models (third-party technical providers) to generate automated proposals (notably responses to reviews, message drafts). These systems may produce errors, inaccuracies, inappropriate formulations, or content that does not correspond to the real context or the Merchant's intent. The User expressly acknowledges this.

Non-liability AI: the content generated by the AI is provided solely as suggestions and must be reviewed, adapted, and validated by the User before any sending or publication. The Merchant remains solely responsible for the texts it disseminates and the effects of their use regarding consumer law, competition, and reputation. Except for proven fraud or deceit, REPUTEXA cannot be held responsible for direct or indirect damages resulting from the use or dissemination of AI suggestions (including factual errors, awkwardness, misunderstandings, or potentially inappropriate remarks), nor for the commercial commitments that may arise therefrom; the limitations and liability cap provided in this article fully apply, subject to legally mandatory provisions.

Value of points: accumulated loyalty points have no monetary or cash value. They cannot in any case be converted into cash or refunded. The Merchant reserves the right to modify the reward scales at any time, subject to informing its customers in accordance with applicable law. REPUTEXA does not convert points into cash.

Importing third-party data: when using the customer file import function, the Merchant guarantees that it has collected the data lawfully and has the right to transfer them to the REPUTEXA platform. REPUTEXA disclaims any responsibility in the event of importing contact lists that have not given their prior consent or are not based on another appropriate legal basis.

For final customer data (review solicitation, messaging, loyalty), the User is the data controller and REPUTEXA acts on its documented instructions. The User agrees to fair use of the channels: respect for the announced purpose to the customer (reviews, loyalty, rewards) and applicable anti-spam rules.

When the User activates team motivation or internal ranking features, it guarantees the accuracy of the entered information (identities or pseudonyms) and informs the concerned individuals in accordance with labor law and company practices (including, if applicable, representative bodies). These features are designed as valuation tools (collective objectives, rewards) and not as a punitive monitoring device for individuals; any misuse for disciplinary purposes is the sole responsibility of the User. Team sharing links must be limited to authorized persons; they are provided as secure links not indexed by search engines.
cgu.droit_content: These ToS are governed by French law. For professionals, in the absence of an amicable agreement, exclusive jurisdiction is attributed to the competent courts of Paris, subject to rules of material jurisdiction. The consumer client residing in the European Union may bring proceedings in the courts of their place of residence or those of Paris, in accordance with the Brussels I bis Regulation. For low-value disputes, the instance or proximity courts may have jurisdiction according to French law.
cgu.zenith_obligations_title: 7. Zenith Plan — Merchant Obligations and Limitation of Liability
cgu.zenith_obligations_content:
Activating the Zenith plan and using automated review collection via WhatsApp ('Capture AI'), possibly combined with loyalty messages, imposes clear and prior information on the Merchant. In accordance with articles 13 and 14 of the GDPR and article L.34-5 of the Postal and Electronic Communications Code, the Merchant must inform its customers (point of sale, online checkout, T&Cs): (1) of the collection of the number; (2) of the purposes (loyalty, rewards, review solicitation via REPUTEXA as applicable); (3) of the right of opposition (STOP and possible consequences on the loyalty account). For e-commerce, a separate consent checkbox may be required before any sending. This obligation rests with the Merchant as the data controller. REPUTEXA, as a technical processor, cannot be held responsible for the Merchant's breaches.

The system includes safeguards for frequency and an opposition list (STOP). Messages must remain proportionate to the announced purposes. Suggestions drafted by the AI must be validated by the Merchant before sending.
cgu.annexe_fidelite_title: Annex — Customer Information Template (loyalty, checkout, WhatsApp)
cgu.annexe_fidelite_content:
The text below is a transparency template to be inserted into your loyalty regulations, registration form, or point-of-sale display. Replace [Store Name] with your brand and indicate the link to your unique privacy policy (ideally the same URL as the REPUTEXA 'Loyalty and Reviews' poster). Reminder: have it validated by your advisor.

By joining the loyalty program and providing your data to [Store Name], you are informed that your number and purchase history may be used to manage your points, your rewards (tiers, birthday benefits), contact you on your account, and, if applicable, solicit you for a satisfaction survey, according to our privacy policy.

If you are part of a network of stores operated by the same controller, your benefits may be pooled among these stores unless otherwise stated at the counter.

Loyalty points have no monetary value: they are not convertible into cash or refundable. The store reserves the right to adapt the reward scales while informing you as required by law.

When we use WhatsApp (review collection or messages related to the program), the REPUTEXA technical tool may be used for sending. Responding STOP ends the messages; a total withdrawal may lead to the closure of the loyalty account and loss of unused points, as specified at the counter.

In accordance with the GDPR, you have the rights of access, rectification, deletion, opposition, limitation, and portability; contact the details in our privacy policy.
cgu.modifications_title: 8. Modification of the ToS and Service
cgu.modifications_content: REPUTEXA may modify these ToS, prices, or service features. Users will be informed by any appropriate means (email, notification on the site, banner). Continuing to use the service after notification constitutes acceptance of the new conditions, except for the right to terminate within the time limits provided by law. In the event of a substantial unfavorable modification, the consumer may terminate without charge under the legal conditions.
cgu.mediation_content: The consumer may freely resort to a consumer mediator in accordance with the Consumer Code, after attempting direct amicable resolution with REPUTEXA. The identity of the mediator will be specified on the site once the system is formalized. European ODR platform: https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/
cgu.suspension_title: 10. Suspension, Termination, and End of Subscription
cgu.suspension_content: The subscription is cancellable according to the terms provided by Stripe and the offers displayed at the time of subscription. In case of non-payment, manifestly abusive use of the service (attempts to circumvent limits, compromising security, use contrary to the ToS) or prolonged technical impossibility attributable to a third party, REPUTEXA may suspend or terminate access after notice when the situation allows. At the end of the contract, access to the service ceases; the merchant account data is processed according to the privacy policy (export, deletion, legal retention). Final customer data processed on behalf of the merchant (Zenith) is subject to the instructions of the data controller (the merchant) within the limits of technical feasibility.
cgu.force_majeure_content: REPUTEXA cannot be held responsible for non-performance or poor performance of its obligations when this is due to a case of force majeure or an event beyond its reasonable control (widespread Internet infrastructure failures, disasters, conflicts, decisions by essential authorities or providers, large-scale cyberattacks despite appropriate security measures). The service may be temporarily interrupted for planned or emergency maintenance; reasonable information will be provided when circumstances allow.
cgu.contact_content: For any questions regarding these ToS: contact@reputexa.fr.

terms.title: General Terms and Conditions of Sale
terms.metaTitle: General Terms and Conditions of Sale | REPUTEXA
terms.metaDescription: REPUTEXA general terms and conditions of sale. SaaS subscription, right of withdrawal, liability, French jurisdiction.
terms.intro: Last updated: March 2026. These General Terms and Conditions of Sale (GTCS) govern the use of the REPUTEXA service and apply to any subscription taken out on the site reputexa.fr.
terms.objet_content: These GTCS define the terms of access and use of the REPUTEXA service, a SaaS reputation platform. By creating an account or subscribing, you unreservedly accept these conditions. If you do not accept these GTCS, you must not use the service.
terms.services_lead: REPUTEXA offers a service for aggregating Google reviews, AI-generated response suggestions, alerts in case of negative reviews, and reporting. Features vary according to the chosen plan: <vision>Vision</vision>, <pulse>Pulse</pulse>, and <zenith>Zenith</zenith>. Detailed descriptions of the offers are available on the Pricing page.
terms.services_2_1_p1: The user acknowledges and agrees that the REPUTEXA service may be configured to publish responses automatically.
terms.services_2_1_resp: <resp>Responsibility:</resp> The user remains solely responsible for the content published on their property listings. It is their responsibility to configure the filters and tones of the AI appropriately.
terms.services_2_1_edit: <edit>Right to Modify:</edit> The user may modify or delete a published response at any time via their dashboard or directly on the relevant platform (Google).
terms.services_2_1_neg: <neg>Case of Negative Reviews:</neg> For reviews deemed 'negative' (according to the criteria of the chosen plan), the system may be configured to suspend automation and require manual validation.
terms.services_2_2_p1: The responses proposed by the AI are <sug>suggestions</sug>. The user is required to <validate>validate, adapt, or modify</validate> any content before publication on review platforms. No response may be published automatically without explicit validation action from the client.
terms.services_2_3_p1: WhatsApp alerts (notifications in case of negative reviews or reports) are provided via the <wa>WhatsApp (Meta)</wa> API. Their availability and proper functioning depend on the terms of use and policies of Meta. REPUTEXA is not the provider of the WhatsApp service.
terms.services_2_4_p1: The request for deletion or moderation of a review with platforms (notably Google) falls under the policies and processes of these <third>third parties</third>. REPUTEXA may provide tools or suggestions (legal arguments, forms) to assist you, but does not guarantee any results: the final decision belongs to Google or the relevant operator.
terms.inscription_p1: Registration requires a valid email address and the creation of a secure password. You are responsible for the confidentiality of your credentials and all actions taken from your account. REPUTEXA reserves the right to suspend or close any account in case of violation of the GTCS or fraudulent use.
terms.abonnement_p1: The subscription is <rec>recurring</rec> (monthly or annually depending on the chosen plan) and is subject to automatic payment via <stripe>Stripe</stripe>. Payment is collected by Stripe, Inc. (credit cards, SEPA, local payment methods). Prices are displayed in euros including tax on the Pricing page.
terms.abonnement_li1: Billing occurs at subscription, then at each renewal anniversary date.
terms.abonnement_li2: <due>Any month or period started is fully due</due>; no prorated refund will be granted in case of termination during the period.
terms.abonnement_li3: Invoices are available in your client area and via the Stripe client portal.
terms.abonnement_li4: In case of payment refusal, you will be informed; you will have a period to update your payment information before service suspension.
terms.multi_title: 5. Multi-Property, Discount Pricing, and Credit Management
terms.multi_p1: Plans allowing multiple properties (Pulse, Zenith) apply a <policy>discount pricing policy</policy>: the more locations subscribed, the lower the unit price per property (progressive discounts according to tiers, detailed on the Pricing page).
terms.multi_prorata_intro: When a client adds one or more properties during a billing period:
terms.multi_prorata_li1: <pr>An immediate prorata is applied</pr> for the remaining days until the next due date, taking into account the discount scale.
terms.multi_prorata_li2: The supplement is billed and deducted immediately upon adding.
terms.multi_prorata_li3: The client accepts this billing by validating the addition of property(ies).
terms.multi_h4_downgrade: Downgrading to a Lower Plan or Reducing the Number of Locations
terms.multi_downgrade_p1: In the event of downgrading to a cheaper plan or reducing the number of subscribed properties, financial management is handled by <stripe>Stripe</stripe>: a <credit>credit note</credit> is generated on the client account for the unused portion of the current period, which will be deducted from future invoices. The data and properties already created are <kept>retained</kept>; only access is limited to the new quota (locations beyond the quota are disabled until a new upgrade). No data deletion is performed due to a downgrade.
terms.retract_p1: In accordance with article L. 221-18 of the Consumer Code, the consumer has a period of 14 calendar days to exercise their right of withdrawal.
terms.retract_p2: <waive>Express Waiver of the Right of Withdrawal – Immediate Execution:</waive> By creating an account, activating a trial period, or accessing the service, the client expressly requests the immediate execution of the digital service. In accordance with article L. 221-25 of the Consumer Code, the client irrevocably waives their right of withdrawal for this service, as soon as execution has begun with their prior express agreement.
terms.resiliation_p1: You can terminate your subscription at any time from your client area or via the Stripe client portal. Termination takes effect at the end of the current period; no prorata will be applied for the remaining days.
terms.resiliation_p2: REPUTEXA reserves the right to suspend or terminate access in case of non-payment, breach of the GTCS, or unethical use. Refunds are processed on a case-by-case basis, in accordance with applicable regulations.
terms.liability_intro: REPUTEXA is committed to providing a quality service in accordance with its description. The clauses below apply without restriction, regardless of the client's turnover.
terms.liability_81_p1: REPUTEXA's total liability, for all facts and damages combined, is strictly limited to the amount of sums actually paid by the client for the subscription during the twelve (12) months preceding the event giving rise to liability. REPUTEXA cannot be held responsible for indirect damages, including but not limited to: loss of profits, loss of turnover, loss of customers, loss of data, commercial harm, loss of data related to reviews or the Google Business Profile, or any other economic prejudice of the same nature.
terms.liability_82_p1: REPUTEXA provides an assistance tool offering <sug>suggestions</sug> for responses generated by artificial intelligence models. These suggestions are provided strictly for indicative purposes. The client is the <edit>sole editorial responsible</edit> for the responses they choose to publish on review platforms. REPUTEXA disclaims any liability for errors, inaccuracies, hallucinations, inappropriate, non-compliant, or illegal content that may be contained in the AI-generated content. The client agrees to verify, adapt, and validate any content before publication.
terms.liability_83_title: 8.3 Independence from Google and Review Deletion
terms.liability_83_p1: REPUTEXA is an independent company from Google LLC, Google Ireland Limited, and any entity of the Google group. REPUTEXA does not exercise any control over the services, APIs, policies, or terms of use of Google. The <mod>deletion or moderation of reviews</mod> depends exclusively on third parties (Google and other platforms); REPUTEXA provides support (arguments, forms) but cannot guarantee any results. Any changes made by Google to its APIs, moderation rules, suspension or deletion of a Google Business Profile, or any other modification of its services, cannot give rise to a refund, compensation, or price reduction from REPUTEXA. The client assumes all risks associated with the use of Google services.
terms.liability_84_p1: Disruptions, unavailability, or failures attributable to third parties (Google, Stripe, hosts, technical providers) cannot engage REPUTEXA's liability beyond its expressly provided contractual obligations.
terms.fm_p1: <fm>Force Majeure:</fm> REPUTEXA cannot be held responsible for non-compliance with its obligations in case of force majeure as defined in article 1218 of the Civil Code (event beyond the reasonable control of the debtor, unforeseeable, irresistible, and external).
terms.fm_p2: <divis>Divisibility:</divis> If one or more provisions of these GTCS are found to be null or unenforceable by a final court decision, the other provisions shall retain their full force and scope.
terms.ip_p1: REPUTEXA retains exclusive ownership of the platform, algorithms, interfaces, and any associated trademarks. The subscription grants you a non-exclusive and non-transferable right of use, strictly limited to your professional use. Any unauthorized reproduction or exploitation is prohibited.
terms.cgvchg_p1: REPUTEXA may modify these GTCS. Substantial modifications will be communicated by email at least 30 days before their entry into force. In case of disagreement, you may terminate your subscription before the effective date. Continuing to use the service constitutes acceptance of the new conditions.
terms.law_p1: These GTCS are governed by <law>French law</law>. In the absence of an amicable agreement, exclusive jurisdiction is attributed to the <court>Commercial Court of Paris</court> for any dispute relating to their interpretation or execution.
terms.law_p2: The consumer client residing in the European Union retains the ability to bring proceedings in the courts of their place of residence, in accordance with Regulation (EU) No. 1215/2012 (Brussels I bis).
terms.cgv_contact_p: For any questions regarding these GTCS: <link>contact@reputexa.fr</link>.

cookieBanner.subtitle: Essential cookies for the site; audience measurement and comfort only with your consent.
cookieBanner.desc: Strictly necessary cookies are set for authentication, security, and core functionality. Analytics or preference cookies are only activated with your choice. You can modify your preferences at any time by revisiting this banner during a legal update.
cookieBanner.cookieSyncHint: When our texts are republished (including after automated monitoring), we may ask you to confirm your choices again.

sentinel.title: Circuit Level Performance
sentinel.body: Our system is designed like a race car. We have performance probes (Sentinel) that check responsiveness every minute. Today, we are operating at under 120 ms, which is 5 times faster than the average of traditional POS software.

zenith.otpClickHint: 👆 Click the code to automatically validate your account.
zenith.otpValidityHint: Code valid for 15 minutes. If it doesn't work, please enter the 6 digits manually.

fr.title: Confirmation de votre choix de plan
fr.confirm: Nous vous confirmons que votre choix pour le plan {planName} a bien été enregistré pour la suite de votre abonnement.
fr.noChange: Ce qui change pour vous : Absolument rien pour l'instant. Vous conservez l'intégralité de vos accès au plan ZÉNITH à titre gracieux jusqu'à la fin de votre période d'essai, le {trialEndDate}.
fr.charge: Le premier prélèvement de {planPrice} n'interviendra qu'à cette date, sur le plan que vous venez de sélectionner.
fr.closing: Nous restons à votre entière disposition pour vous accompagner dans la croissance de votre établissement.
fr.lossNote: 💡 En passant sur ce plan à la fin de votre essai, vous n'aurez plus accès aux fonctionnalités exclusives du plan ZÉNITH mais uniquement à celles du plan {planName}.

en.title: Plan selection confirmed
en.confirm: We confirm that your choice of the {planName} plan has been recorded for your future subscription.
en.noChange: What changes for you: Nothing for now. You keep full access to the ZENITH plan at no charge until the end of your trial period on {trialEndDate}.
en.charge: The first charge of {planPrice} will only occur on that date, for the plan you have just selected.
en.closing: We remain at your disposal to support the growth of your business.
en.lossNote: 💡 By switching to this plan at the end of your trial, you will no longer have access to ZENITH-only features—only those of the {planName} plan.

de.title: Bestätigung Ihrer Planwahl
de.confirm: Wir bestätigen, dass Ihre Wahl des Plans {planName} für Ihr künftiges Abonnement gespeichert wurde.
de.noChange: Was sich für Sie ändert: Vorerst nichts. Sie behalten den vollen Zugang zum ZENITH-Plan bis zum Ende Ihrer Testphase am {trialEndDate}.
de.charge: Die erste Abbuchung von {planPrice} erfolgt erst an diesem Tag für den von Ihnen gewählten Plan.
de.closing: Wir stehen Ihnen zur Verfügung, um das Wachstum Ihres Betriebs zu unterstützen.
de.lossNote: 💡 Mit Wechsel auf diesen Plan nach Ende der Testphase verlieren Sie exklusive ZENITH-Funktionen—nur noch die des Plans {planName}.

es.title: Confirmación de su elección de plan
es.confirm: Confirmamos que su elección del plan {planName} quedó registrada para su próxima suscripción.
es.noChange: Qué cambia para usted: De momento, nada. Mantiene el acceso completo al plan ZENITH sin coste hasta el final de su periodo de prueba, el {trialEndDate}.
es.charge: El primer cargo de {planPrice} solo tendrá lugar en esa fecha, para el plan que acaba de seleccionar.
es.closing: Seguimos a su disposición para apoyar el crecimiento de su negocio.
es.lossNote: 💡 Al pasar a este plan al finalizar la prueba, ya no tendrá funciones exclusivas de ZENITH—solo las del plan {planName}.

it.title: Conferma della scelta del piano
it.confirm: Confermiamo che la scelta del piano {planName} è stata registrata per il tuo abbonamento futuro.
it.noChange: Cosa cambia per te: Nulla per ora. Mantieni l’accesso completo al piano ZENITH senza costi fino alla fine del periodo di prova, il {trialEndDate}.
it.charge: Il primo addebito di {planPrice} avverrà solo in quella data, per il piano che hai appena selezionato.
it.closing: Restiamo a disposizione per supportare la crescita della tua attività.
it.lossNote: 💡 Passando a questo piano al termine della prova, non avrai più accesso alle funzionalità esclusive ZENITH—solo a quelle del piano {planName}.

pt.title: Confirmação da sua escolha de plano
pt.confirm: Confirmamos que a sua escolha do plano {planName} foi registada para a sua futura subscrição.
pt.noChange: O que muda para si: Por agora, nada. Mantém acesso total ao plano ZENITH sem custo até ao fim do período de teste, a {trialEndDate}.
pt.charge: O primeiro débito de {planPrice} só ocorrerá nessa data, para o plano que acabou de selecionar.
pt.closing: Continuamos à sua disposição para apoiar o crescimento do seu negócio.
pt.lossNote: 💡 Ao mudar para este plano no fim do teste, deixará de ter as funcionalidades exclusivas ZENITH—apenas as do plano {planName}.

ja.title: プラン選択の確認
ja.confirm: 本サブスクリプション用に{planName}プランをお選びいただいたことを確認いたします。
ja.noChange: 変更点：現時点ではありません。無償のZENITHプランへのアクセスは、お試し期間終了日の{trialEndDate}まで継続します。
ja.charge: {planPrice}の初回請求は、その日にのみ発生し、ご選択されたプランに適用されます。
ja.closing: 事業の成長をサポートできるよう引き続きサポートいたします。
ja.lossNote: 💡 試用終了後にこのプランへ移行すると、ZENITH専用機能は利用できず、{planName}プランの機能のみとなります。

zh.title: 确认您的方案选择
zh.confirm: 我们已记录您为未来订阅所选的{planName}方案。
zh.noChange: 对您有何变化：目前没有任何变化。在试用期结束日{trialEndDate}之前，您仍可免费完整使用 ZENITH 方案。
zh.charge: 首次扣款{planPrice}仅在该日期进行，对应您刚选择的方案。
zh.closing: 我们随时支持您的业务增长。
zh.lossNote: 💡 试用结束后若切换到该方案，将无法再使用 ZENITH 专属功能，仅保留 {planName} 方案功能。

ApiAdmin.prismaClientStale: Prisma client stale: stop the dev server, run 'npx prisma generate', restart dev. (On Windows, EPERM on query_engine = file locked while Next is running.)
ApiAdmin.legalNotifyFieldsRequired: documentName, summary and targetLink are required
ApiAdmin.broadcastFormatRawSystemPrompt: You write clear B2B transactional emails. Strict JSON output only. Brand: REPUTEXA. You can rely on the DEPOSIT CONTEXT for exact product facts, without inventing.
ApiAdmin.broadcastFormatRawUserPrompt:
The text below is a free draft (notes, lists, phrases). Transform it into a professional informational email for merchants subscribed to REPUTEXA.
If the DEPOSIT CONTEXT below is relevant, cite product developments factually (without jargon); otherwise, stick to the draft only.

Source text:
{raw}{extra}

Respond in JSON only, without markdown: an object with keys subject (email subject, one line in English) and html (HTML fragment only: paragraphs, lists, emphasis; no html/head/body).
ApiAdmin.broadcastImproveSubjectDraftHint: Subject: (to be briefly written if absent)
ApiAdmin.broadcastImproveSystemPrompt: You are a B2B SaaS transactional writer. You rewrite informational emails in English. Output: strict JSON, no text around. DEPOSIT CONTEXT: product facts only if they fit the message.
ApiAdmin.codeGuardianJournalScanLine: Code Guardian audit: score {score}/100 — cleanup {cleanup} · perf {performance} · structure {structure}
ApiAdmin.weeklyRecapDeprecatedCronMessage: weekly-recap is deprecated. Schedule only /api/cron/weekly-insight (Supabase data, WhatsApp per subscriber).
ApiAdmin.toxicitySweepNothingToSweep: Nothing to process for this passage.
ApiAdmin.ghostProtocolActivityLog: Ghost Protocol [{layer}] {pillarLabel} — {findingCount} observation(s), score {nextScore}/100 — next pillar: {nextPillarPreview}
ApiAdmin.growthWarRoomDataUnavailable: Data unavailable (Prisma migrations / base up to date?)
ApiAdmin.investorMetricsChatSystemPrompt:
You are a senior FP&A director (English), for a restricted REPUTEXA committee.
You have a structured dossier below: MRR, Stripe cash flow, monthly historical paid invoices (multiple years if Stripe goes back far enough in pagination), plan mix, short and long cohorts, estimated profitability per client (prorated MRR), burn vs growth, Executive Summary texts.

Strict rules:
- All figures, percentages, and dates must come from the dossier. No invented or 'approximate' amounts without indicating.
- If a period or data does not appear in the dossier, say so and propose what to collect — do not guess.
- Willingly cross MRR, historical collections, cohorts, and estimated margins for a reading type internal due diligence.
- Style: reasoned analysis, short subtitles, bullets, consulting tone (clear, decisive), without filler.
- One framing sentence: indicative / unaudited figures, no automatic decision executed based on this chat.

DOSSIER:
{context}
ApiAdmin.rlhfSnippetValidateBody: RLHF admin validation: keep the tone and formulations of the validated response — excerpt: « {extract} »
ApiAdmin.babelWizardTableMissing: Missing table — run migration 167 then npx prisma generate.
ApiAdmin.babelExpansionTableMissing: babel_expansion_drafts table missing — migration 166 + npx prisma generate.
ApiAdmin.babelNativeRestartHint: After native deployment: run `npx prisma generate` if the schema has changed, then restart `npm run dev` to reload the Prisma client and imports `messages/*.json`.
ApiAdmin.babelApplyWizardHint: Smart-merge: regex merge in .ts — run `npm run build` afterwards. tmp/babel-wizard-apply must contain the .md from the wizard.
ApiAdmin.babelExpansionAllKeysDoneMessage: All root keys are processed. Download the JSON and integrate it into the repo.
ApiAdmin.babelExpansionDoneDownloadMessage: Done. Download messages/{locale}.json from the panel.
ApiAdmin.babelExpansionBatchMessage: Batch processed ({batches}). Click 'Continue' for the next steps.
ApiAdmin.complianceMerchantIdInvalid: merchant_id invalid: expected a UUID (e.g., merchant profile id).
ApiAdmin.complianceCsvDatasetRequired: For CSV, use dataset=queue or dataset=consent
ApiAdmin.autoHealAnthropicNotConfigured: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not configured — AI diagnostics impossible.
ApiAdmin.autoHealAnthropicNotConfiguredShort: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not configured. AI diagnostics impossible.
ApiAdmin.autoHealClaudeAskPrompt:
You are a senior DevOps engineer for REPUTEXA (Next.js/Supabase SaaS). Analyze this Sentinel incident and generate the necessary correction for Auto-Healing.

SERVICE IN FAILURE: {service}
ERROR MESSAGE: {errorMessage}
LATENCY: {latency}{filesBlock}{forgeSection}

STRICT INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Identify the precise root cause (defective code, missing config, third-party outage, timeout)
2. Choose the type of action:
   - "code_fix"         → error in identifiable and correctable source code
   - "deploy_hook"      → restart sufficient (timeout, lost connection)
   - "env_issue"        → missing or invalid environment variable
   - "external_outage"  → third-party provider outage (OpenAI/Twilio/Anthropic down)
3. If "code_fix": generate the COMPLETE and functional content of the corrected file
4. If "env_issue" or "external_outage": deploy_needed = false

Respond ONLY in valid JSON (zero markdown, zero code blocks) with fields diagnosis, action_type, confidence, code_fix, deploy_needed, summary_for_dashboard, prevention.
ApiAdmin.autoHealClaudeInvalidOrUnreachable: Claude unreachable or invalid JSON response.
ApiAdmin.autoHealCodeFixDashboardFallback: Automatic correction applied by Claude 3.5 Sonnet in {file_path}. New deployment in progress.
ApiAdmin.autoHealDesignBugGitHubNotConfigured: GITHUB_TOKEN or GITHUB_REPO not configured. Unable to create PR.
ApiAdmin.autoHealDesignBugNoNewContent:
Diagnosis: {diagnosis}

Claude did not generate new content.
ApiAdmin.autoHealDesignBugPrFailed:
Diagnosis generated but PR failed: {errMsg}

Diagnosis: {diagnosis}
ApiAdmin.autoHealDesignBugSourceNotFound: Source file not found on GitHub: {filePath}
ApiAdmin.autoHealDesignBugToolNameUnknown: Unable to determine the tool name from the incident message.

ApiAi.featureNotAvailableForPlan: Feature not available for this plan.

ApiAi.weeklyInsightNoReviewsWatch: As soon as customers post feedback, this summary will automatically update.
ApiAi.weeklyInsightNoReviewsAdvice: Highlight an easy way to leave a review (QR code, short link, reminder at checkout) for the upcoming week.
ApiAi.weeklyInsightNoReviewsFullReport: Period: {weekLabel}. Property: {establishmentName}. No reviews were received during this interval.
ApiAi.weeklyInsightSystemPrompt: You produce ONLY valid JSON. No markdown, no comments. Deep semantic analysis, concrete data.
ApiAi.weeklyInsightModelLanguageHint: Write all text fields in JSON in English.
ApiAi.weeklyInsightPromptRules:
You are the data e-reputation director of a Fortune 500 company. You analyze customer reviews of a property to produce an ultra-precise weekly report.

STRICT SEMANTIC ANALYSIS RULES:
- Never say 'people love the food' or generalities.
- Provide concrete facts: 'The keyword 'Caesar Salad' appears 4 times with a positive connotation regarding freshness.'
- Correlate signals: 'The word 'Wait' is correlated with reviews from Saturday night.'
- Detect weak signals: 'Staff seems stressed on weekends' if indicators suggest it.
ApiAi.weeklyInsightScarceReviewsNote: IMPORTANT: only {count} reviews — be cautious, qualify the analysis ('early signals'), no broad statements.
ApiAi.weeklyInsightPromptJsonSpec:
You must produce JSON exactly in this format:
{
  "topSection": "What earned points (short phrases, precise data)",
  "watchSection": "Weak signals or recurring issues to monitor",
  "adviceSection": "A concrete and profitable action (e.g., Shift the 7 PM shift to 6:30 PM to absorb the detected peak)",
  "fullReport": "Complete report in several paragraphs, Fortune 500 style",
  "trendSeverity": 0-100 (0=no issues, 100=critical alert)
}

privacyRoute.metaDescription: Privacy policy and personal data protection of REPUTEXA. GDPR compliance, Google review management, Stripe payments.
privacyRoute.intro: Last updated: March 2026. This policy outlines how REPUTEXA collects, uses, and protects your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
privacyRoute.s1_p1: The data controller for personal data is REPUTEXA, publisher of the site reputexa.com, whose headquarters are located in the United States.
privacyRoute.s1_p2: We process your data lawfully, fairly, and transparently, in accordance with GDPR.
privacyRoute.s2_li1: Email: professional email address for account creation, communications, and authentication
privacyRoute.s2_li2: Billing Data: identity, contact details, and payment information provided to Stripe for subscription processing and invoicing
privacyRoute.s2_li3: Access to Reviews via Google API: content of reviews, ratings, dates, data from your Google Business Profile (see section 4)
privacyRoute.s2_li4: Identification and Professional Data: name, surname, phone, property name, address, Google Location ID
privacyRoute.s2_li5: Technical Data: IP address, connection logs, cookies (see section 8)
privacyRoute.s3_intro: The data is processed for the following purposes, based on the indicated legal bases:
privacyRoute.s3_li1: Contract Execution: account creation, access to the service, subscription management
privacyRoute.s3_li2: Legitimate Interest: service improvement, internal analytics, fraud prevention
privacyRoute.s3_li3: Consent: newsletter, marketing communications (revocable at any time)
privacyRoute.s4_p1: Data related to Google reviews is collected via the Google Business Profile API after your authorization. This includes the content of reviews (text, rating, date), the name or pseudonym of the contributor, and your property identifier. This data is used for display in the dashboard, for generating AI response suggestions (see section 5), alerts, and reporting.
privacyRoute.s4_p2: Data Ownership: Review data displayed on Google Business Profile remains the property of the client or Google, as applicable. REPUTEXA does not claim any ownership of this content. However, REPUTEXA is authorized to process, store, and use it strictly within the provision of the service and for the purposes described herein.
privacyRoute.s5_p1: Collected reviews are processed by artificial intelligence models (providers such as OpenAI, Google, or equivalents) to generate personalized response suggestions, solely on behalf of the user and strictly within the scope of the REPUTEXA service.
privacyRoute.s5_p2: REPUTEXA does not sell, share, or monetize review data or AI-processed content for purposes other than service provision. AI processes reviews solely to enable the client to respond to their reviews and improve their e-reputation; no secondary use (targeted advertising, data resale, third-party profiling) is performed.
privacyRoute.s6_body: Billing and payment data are transmitted to Stripe (Stripe, Inc.), a PCI-DSS certified provider, for subscription processing (Vision, Pulse, Zenith plans), card tokenization, and invoicing. Sensitive banking data never passes through our servers. Stripe Policy: stripe.com/privacy.
privacyRoute.s7_intro: Your data may be transferred and processed by the following subcontractors, strictly within the scope of their mission. These transfers are carried out in accordance with GDPR and the privacy policies of each provider:
privacyRoute.s7_li1: Stripe – Payments, billing, and subscription management (cards, prorated charges, credits)
privacyRoute.s7_li2: Resend – Sending transactional emails (confirmation, alerts, account notifications)
privacyRoute.s7_li3: WhatsApp API (Meta) – Sending notifications and alerts (negative reviews, reminders) when you have enabled this option on your plan
privacyRoute.s7_li4: Supabase – Data hosting (database, authentication); data may be hosted in the European Union depending on configuration
privacyRoute.s7_li5: OpenAI / AI providers – Processing reviews for generating response suggestions (see section 5)
privacyRoute.s7_li6: Google – OAuth connection and Google Business Profile API (reviews, property listings)
privacyRoute.s7_li7: Vercel – Hosting of the site and application
privacyRoute.s7_footer: These providers are subject to contractual obligations compliant with GDPR. You can review their respective privacy policies (Stripe, Resend, Meta/WhatsApp, Supabase, etc.) on their official websites.
privacyRoute.s8_p1: The site uses strictly necessary technical cookies for the operation of the service:
privacyRoute.s8_li1: Session and Authentication: maintaining user session and securing access
privacyRoute.s8_li2: Stripe Security: cookies necessary for payment processing and fraud prevention
privacyRoute.s8_p2: These cookies do not require prior consent under Article 82 of the 'Data Protection and Freedom' law and GDPR, as they are strictly necessary for service provision. No specific consent banner is displayed for these technical cookies.
privacyRoute.s9_p1: Your data is retained for the duration of your account, then for the applicable legal retention periods (billing: 10 years). Connection data and logs are retained for a maximum of 12 months. In case of account deletion, your data is deleted or anonymized within 30 days, unless legally required to retain.
privacyRoute.s10_intro: In accordance with GDPR, you have the following rights:
privacyRoute.s10_li1: Right of Access and rectification of your data
privacyRoute.s10_li2: Right to Erasure ('right to be forgotten') within the limits provided by law
privacyRoute.s10_li5: Right to Object to processing, particularly for marketing purposes
privacyRoute.s10_rights: To exercise these rights, contact us at <contactLink>contact@reputexa.com</contactLink>. You may also file a complaint with the CNIL (<cnilLink>cnil.fr</cnilLink>).
privacyRoute.s11_p1: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures (SSL encryption, secure authentication, access control) to protect your data against unauthorized access, loss, or alteration.
privacyRoute.s12_p1: We reserve the right to modify this policy. Any significant changes will be communicated via email or through a notification in your client area. The date of the last update is indicated at the top of the document.
privacyRoute.s13_body: For any questions regarding the protection of your data: <contactLink>contact@reputexa.com</contactLink>.

faqs.q: How does the AI generate responses to reviews?
faqs.a: REPUTEXA uses Claude 3.5 Sonnet from Anthropic as the primary generation engine. In case of unavailability, GPT-4o-mini from OpenAI automatically takes over (dual-engine with seamless switching). Each response applies strict rules: "mirror effect" (reusing keywords from the review), zero hallucination, tone configured in your AI DNA.

faqs.q: Can the AI adapt the tone according to my brand identity?
faqs.a: Yes. In your Property settings, you can define a "Brand Brief": sector, tone (formal, warm, premium…), language elements to avoid, and recurring keywords. The AI systematically incorporates these guidelines into each suggestion.

faqs.q: Are responses sent automatically?
faqs.a: Yes, partially. Positive reviews receive an automatic response with a simulated human delay of 2 to 9 hours. For negative reviews: on the VISION plan, validation occurs from the dashboard; on the PULSE and ZENITH plans, the negative review alert is sent via WhatsApp with a suggested response that you can modify or publish. Once published, the response is placed in a queue of 2 to 7 hours before going live.

faqs.q: Does the AI handle reviews in other languages?
faqs.a: On the VISION plan, the AI responds in your Property's primary language. On PULSE and ZENITH, the language is automatically detected for each review, and the response is generated in the same language as the original review (English, Spanish, German, Italian, etc.).

faqs.q: What is the accuracy of the toxicity analysis?
faqs.a: Our analysis model achieves 97.4% accuracy on our internal benchmark (10,000 manually annotated reviews). The Shield Center distinguishes legitimate negative reviews from abusive, defamatory, or artificially generated content.

faqs.q: What is the Shield Center?
faqs.a: The Shield Center is our advanced monitoring system that analyzes each received review based on 14 indicators: toxicity, authenticity, fraudulent intent, sentiment, cited entities, etc. It automatically generates alerts when a review requires immediate attention and can report certain reviews directly to Google.

faqs.q: How does fake review detection work?
faqs.a: Our algorithm cross-references multiple signals: temporal consistency (abnormal spikes in reviews), common linguistic patterns among accounts, geolocation of reviewers, activity history of profiles. An authenticity score is assigned to each review, visible in your dashboard.

faqs.q: Can I contest a review directly from REPUTEXA?
faqs.a: The AI Shield prepares a file (reasons, wording for moderators) to paste into the Google Business Profile reporting form. Google does not offer a public API to delete a review on your behalf: the final submission is done on Google after your review.

faqs.q: Are WhatsApp alerts included in all plans?
faqs.a: Immediate WhatsApp alerts (negative reviews) and the weekly WhatsApp summary are available starting from the PULSE plan. The VISION plan includes only email notifications. On ZENITH, the AI Capture module additionally allows you to automatically invite your customers to leave a review via WhatsApp 30 minutes after their visit.

faqs.q: How do I connect my Google Business Profile?
faqs.a: From your dashboard → Settings → Platforms, click on "Connect Google". An OAuth Google authorization window opens—grant access to manage your listings (business.manage). The connection is established in 30 seconds, and your reviews sync automatically. No manual API key is required.

faqs.q: Which review platforms are connected?
faqs.a: REPUTEXA synchronizes Google Business Profile, Facebook, and Trustpilot. The Google connection is via OAuth; Facebook and Trustpilot via webhook. Other platforms are not yet connected—they are on our roadmap.

faqs.q: Can I connect REPUTEXA to my POS software or Zapier?
faqs.a: Yes, via the AI Capture module (exclusive to ZENITH). An integration key (rtx_live_…) is generated in your Settings → Integrations. It allows your POS systems (Square, SumUp) or no-code tools (Zapier, Make) to send visit data to REPUTEXA, which automatically triggers a WhatsApp invitation 30 minutes after the visit.

faqs.q: How many Properties can I manage?
faqs.a: There is no limit per plan on the number of manageable Properties—the pricing is determined by the number of active Properties with a tiered discount: 1st at full price, 2nd at -20%, 3rd at -30%, 4th at -40%, 5th and more at -50%. Each Property can be managed from a unified dashboard.

faqs.q: Can I change my plan at any time?
faqs.a: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade from your Settings → Subscription area. Upgrades take effect immediately with a prorated calculation. Downgrades apply at the next renewal date.

faqs.q: Does the free trial include all features?
faqs.a: Yes, the 14-day trial gives you access to the full ZENITH plan (the most comprehensive) without restrictions. No credit card is required to start.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy?
faqs.a: If you are not satisfied within the first 30 days of your subscription, we will provide a full refund. No questions asked. Contact us at support@reputexa.com.

faqs.q: How often are statistics updated?
faqs.a: Your reviews are imported as soon as received via webhook (in real-time). The dashboard always reflects the most recent available data. Aggregated statistics (average rating, trends) are recalculated with each dashboard load.

faqs.q: Can I export my reports as PDF?
faqs.a: Yes. Each month, a "cabinet" PDF (stats + AI texts according to your plan) is generated: factual summary in Vision; analyses, sentiment, and tactics in Pulse; enhanced strategic layer in Zenith. You receive it via email and can regenerate or download it from the dashboard archive center. Pulse and Zenith additionally receive a weekly recap on WhatsApp.

faqs.q: Does REPUTEXA work for Properties outside of the United States?
faqs.a: Yes. REPUTEXA is deployed in the United States, Canada, Mexico, and the UK. Our infrastructure is hosted in the European Union (Paris, Frankfurt) to ensure GDPR compliance in all member countries.

faqs.q: Is the interface available in multiple languages?
faqs.a: The REPUTEXA interface is available in English, Spanish, French, German, and Italian. You can change the language from your settings or the selector at the bottom of the page.

onboardingSteps.title: Create Your Account
onboardingSteps.description: Provide your Property information: name, type, address, WhatsApp number, and email. A verification code will be sent immediately to your email address.
onboardingSteps.detail: Cloudflare Turnstile validation protects registration against bots. The phone number must be in international format (e.g., +16175551234).

onboardingSteps.title: Verify Your Email
onboardingSteps.description: Open the email received and enter the 6-digit code on the verification page. This code is valid for 15 minutes.
onboardingSteps.detail: If you do not receive the email, check your spam folder. You can request a new code from the /verify page.

onboardingSteps.title: Connect Google Business Profile
onboardingSteps.description: In your Dashboard → Settings → Platforms, click on 'Connect Google'. A Google OAuth window will open — grant access to manage your listings. Your Reviews are automatically synchronized.
onboardingSteps.detail: REPUTEXA only requests the business.manage permission. No access to your personal Google account is required.

onboardingSteps.title: Set Up Your AI DNA
onboardingSteps.description: In Settings → AI DNA, define the tone (professional, warm, luxurious, casual), response length, and your specific instructions. The AI generates a real-time simulation.
onboardingSteps.detail: On the ZENITH plan, the Triple Judge system generates 3 variants (empathy, storytelling, expertise) and automatically selects the best one.

onboardingSteps.title: Activate WhatsApp Alerts
onboardingSteps.description: In Settings → Notifications, enter your WhatsApp number and set the alert threshold (e.g., Reviews ≤ 3 stars). You will receive each negative Review directly on WhatsApp with the suggested AI response.
onboardingSteps.detail: Available on PULSE and ZENITH. Alerts are sent via Twilio with interactive buttons to approve or modify the response directly from WhatsApp.

DocumentationPage.whatsappIntro: As soon as a negative Review is detected, REPUTEXA automatically triggers this pipeline — no action is required on your part.

whatsappFlow.detail: A customer leaves a Review ≤ 3 stars on Google, Facebook, or Trustpilot.
The AI analyzes toxicity (hate, spam, conflict of interest, doxxing) and generates an authenticity score.
A contextualized response is automatically generated, adhering to your configured AI DNA.
You receive a summary of the Review + the suggested response with 2 buttons: Approve or Modify.
If approved, the response is published with a simulated delay (2–7 hours) for a natural feel. The Shield Center generates a dispute report if the Review is fraudulent.

DocumentationPage.platformsFootnote: The Google connection uses only the business.manage permission — no access to your personal Google account.
DocumentationPage.posIntro: REPUTEXA generates an entry API key (rtx_live_…) visible in your Settings. It allows your external systems (POS software, Zapier, Make) to send visit data to REPUTEXA, which automatically triggers the AI Capture module — a WhatsApp message sent to the customer 30 minutes after their visit inviting them to leave a Review.
DocumentationPage.posKeyNote: This key is for incoming webhooks (data to REPUTEXA). It is not used to read your Reviews or statistics via an external API.
DocumentationPage.keysTitle: Where to Find Your Integration Keys
practices: Configure your AI DNA (tone + instructions) before receiving your first Reviews so that suggestions are immediately calibrated.
Activate WhatsApp alerts on your personal or business number — it's the fastest channel to address an urgent Review.
For the POS webhook, send visit data within 10 minutes after the customer leaves, no later — the 30-minute delay of AI Capture is calculated from the receipt of the webhook.
Never publicly share your rtx_live_key. It is linked to your account and governs the billing of your AI Capture activations.
The Shield Center automatically analyzes each received Review — no configuration needed. Check the Alerts dashboard for critical cases.
In case of an incorrect AI response via WhatsApp, use the 'Modify' button — your correction is remembered to improve future suggestions.
DocumentationPage.ctaBody: Full access to ZENITH for 14 days, no credit card required. Your first AI Review is generated in under 60 seconds after connecting Google.

guides.title: Quick Start: REPUTEXA in 5 Minutes
guides.description: Create your account, connect your Google Business Profile, and receive your first AI response suggestions. Everything you need to be operational immediately.

guides.title: Optimize Your Google Rating: Comprehensive Strategic Guide
guides.description: From 3.8 to 4.7 stars in 6 months — proven strategies to increase your average rating, maximize positive reviews, and address identified critical points.

guides.title: Customize AI Responses to Reflect Your Brand Identity
guides.description: How to set up your Brand Brief so that every AI response perfectly reflects your tone, values, and style. Includes sector-specific examples.

guides.description: Centralize your reviews across the three platforms connected by REPUTEXA and apply best practices for each ecosystem.

guides.title: Analyze Your Monthly PDF Reports Like an Expert
